message:
feat(tools): contact shorthand parsing + reply notifications for Python parity

contacts.rs:
- Add project:<slug>#<Name> shorthand parsing in to_agent field, splitting
  into (target_project_key, target_agent_name) for cross-project contact
  requests matching the Python reference implementation
- Default register_if_missing to true (auto-register unknown agents on
  contact request)
- Clamp minimum TTL from 0 to 60 seconds in both request_contact and
  respond_contact for consistency with server-side policy

messaging.rs:
- Emit NotificationMessage signals to each unique to/cc recipient (never
  bcc) in the reply path, mirroring the send_message notification logic
  that was missing from reply_message for Python parity

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
